_readme: Unified performance tracking — replaces post-log.json. Tracks what was generated, what was skipped and why, A/B hook test results, and feed rhythm data.

ab_test_results._readme: Tracks which hook variant (A/B/C) was chosen each session.

format_hook_wins._readme: Which hook category wins most per format.

log.hook_text: I thought presence was something you felt. Turns out it's something you measure.

A.text: I was in every room. I wasn't in any of them.
A.reason: unclear — drop-in style confused without context

B.text: My AI told me something about my own life that I wasn't ready to hear.
B.reason: avoid — 'my AI' framing feels cold, distances user from ARETE

skip_reasons._readme: Logged when a format is skipped and user gives a reason.

pattern-interrupt.note: Drop-in mid-thought hooks (Hook A style) are unclear without context setup. Use sparingly and only when the opening line is self-explanatory on its own.

ai-reference.note: Avoid 'my AI' phrasing. ARETE should feel like a personal system, not a tool the user is operating. Reference the app by name or by feature (constellation, momentum meter) instead.

feed_rhythm._readme: Tracks the last 10 posts to detect repetition.

training_insights._readme: Insights surfaced from internal agent analysis sessions. Updated after each training run.
confirmed_working: contrarian hooks — strongest category for ARETE, aligns with core premise
vulnerability without resolution — open endings pull more comments than resolved ones
constellation and momentum meter named specifically — more powerful than described
3-slide carousels for direct ads — right length for pre-launch conversion content
comparison angle (6 apps vs ARETE) — highest value content type identified
short declarative sentences with space after — don't explain, let it land
specificity over generality — write like data (six hours, january 19th)
second-to-last line carries emotional weight — last line is the quiet exit
confirmed_not_working: my AI / the AI told me — cold, distances user from ARETE
pattern-interrupt hooks without self-contained context — confusing
resolved endings — wrap-up bows close the door on engagement
vague design specs — every element needs hex, weight, size, position
feed_gaps_to_fill: formats: ugc-rant, quote-drop, day-in-my-life, voiceover-broll (not yet used)
pillars: GOALS, FITNESS, SLEEP, LEARNING, CREATIVITY, FINANCE (not yet touched)
